# Data Model

<!-- Generated by /caveman-docs:ai-context. Manual edits overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### Not applicable in this repository
No database. No ORM schema. No persistent records.

Evidence: no `schema.prisma`, no `@Entity`, no migrations, no `drizzle`/`typeorm`/`sequelize` deps. `hooks/package.json` has only `"type": "commonjs"`.

### Runtime artifacts (filesystem state)

| Artifact | Path | Shape | Lifecycle |
|----------|------|-------|-----------|
| Activation flag | `~/.claude/.caveman-docs-active` | Plain file, content `"active"`, mode `0600` | Created at SessionStart (`caveman-docs-activate.js:14`); unlinked on deactivation prompt (`caveman-docs-tracker.js:92`) |
| Settings | `~/.claude/settings.json` | JSON with `hooks.{SessionStart,UserPromptSubmit,PreToolUse}[]` arrays | Mutated by `hooks/install.sh`; restored from `.caveman-docs.bak` on rollback |
| Settings backup | `~/.claude/settings.json.caveman-docs.bak` | Copy of settings before install | Created at each install (`hooks/install.sh:115`) |

### settings.json hook entry shape

```json
{
  "hooks": {
    "SessionStart": [
      { "matcher": "", "hooks": [{ "type": "command", "command": "node \"$HOOKS_DIR/caveman-docs-activate.js\"", "timeout": 5 }] }
    ],
    "UserPromptSubmit": [
      { "matcher": "", "hooks": [{ "type": "command", "command": "node \"$HOOKS_DIR/caveman-docs-tracker.js\"", "timeout": 5 }] }
    ],
    "PreToolUse": [
      { "matcher": "Write|Edit", "hooks": [{ "type": "command", "command": "node \"$HOOKS_DIR/caveman-docs-pre-write.js\"", "timeout": 3 }] }
    ]
  }
}
```
